meal.name: Tagessuppe
meal.note: Soup of the day

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: "Erbsenrisotto mit gerösteten Sonnenblumenkernen,dazu Pfannengemüse "
meal.note:
"Pea risotto with roasted sunflower seeds, served with stir-fried vegetables
"

meal.name: Rinderragout mit Schwäbischen Spätzle, Ratatuille , Canneloni mit Rcottaspinatfüllung gratiniert
meal.note: Beef ragout with Swabian Spätzle, ratatouille, and gratinéed cannelloni with ricotta and spinach filling.

meal.name: Tagessuppe
meal.note: Soup of the day

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: "Chili Sin Carne mit Kräuterreis "
meal.note: Chili Sin Carne with Herb Rice

meal.name: Gebackener Fleischkäse mit Röstzwiebel , Kartoffelrösti , Sauerkraut und Käsenudeln
meal.note: Baked meatloaf with crispy fried onions, potato rösti, sauerkraut, and cheesy pasta.

meal.name: Tagessuppe
meal.note: Soup of the day

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: Gebackene Grießwürfel mit Roter-Grütze, Vanillesauce und Zimtzucker
meal.note: Baked semolina cubes with red berry compote, vanilla sauce, and cinnamon sugar.

meal.name: Gedämpfter Lachs mit neue Kartöffele, geschmortem Mangold und gebackenem Blumenkohl
meal.note: Steamed salmon with new potatoes, braised chard, and roasted cauliflower

meal.name: Tagessuppe
meal.note: Soup of the day

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name:
"Cremige Polenta mit Ratatouille, Kräuter-Joghurtdip
"
meal.note:
Creamy polenta with ratatouille and herb yogurt dip
"

meal.name: Mariniertes Steak vom heimischen Landschwein mit Ofenkartoffel, Grillgemüse und Brewbitesgemüsecaserole
meal.note: Marinated steak from local free-range pork with a baked potato, grilled vegetables, and Brewbites vegetable casserole.

meal.name: Tagessuppe
meal.note: Soup of the day

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: Veganer Falafe-Döner mit allem drum und dran
meal.note: Vegan falafel döner with all the trimmings

meal.name: Rinder Hamburger mit Pomes Frittes Griechische Nudelpfanne
meal.note: Beef Hamburger with French Fries; Greek-Style Pasta Skillet

meal.name: Tagessuppe
meal.note: Soup of the day

meal.name: Dessert des Tages
meal.note: Dessert of the day

meal.name: Schwäbische Linsen mit veganen Spätzle und Räuchertofu
meal.note: Swabian-style lentils with vegan Spätzle and smoked tofu

meal.name: Mariniertes Steak vom heimischen Landschwein mit Ofenkartoffel, Grillgemüse und Eblygemüsecaserole
meal.note: Marinated steak from local free-range pork with a baked potato, grilled vegetables, and an Ebly vegetable casserole.
